commands.review_summary:
The PR changes memory-core light dreaming ordering, short-term promotion rank/apply gates, live-note relocation matching, docs, and regression tests so daily-only signals can score candidates without satisfying `minRecallCount`.

Reproducibility: yes. A high-confidence source reproduction exists: current main sorts light dreaming by `lastRecalledAt` before `recallCount` and uses daily-inclusive `signalCount` for the default promotion gate.
commands.review_followup: The PR is an active external implementation with missing real behavior proof and remaining correctness/security/changelog blockers, so contributor and maintainer follow-up is needed rather than a repair-lane handoff.
